teachers.name: Arakawa Setsuna
teachers.role: Principal — U.A. High School Hero Course
teachers.quirk_summary: Arakawa emits a continuous low-frequency resonance field that she can tune with precision. At ambient levels it's imperceptible — it does nothing visible. At focus, it can shatter stone, collapse steel load-bearing points, or induce disorientation in biological targets. At maximum output she has brought down the outer wall of a fortified building by holding a single sustained note for four seconds. She has not used it at maximum output in eleven years. She keeps a tuning fork on her desk.
teachers.quirk_mechanics_ref: Resonance — custom. Key features: Ambient Field (passive, negligible effect), Focused Pulse (structural damage, ranged), Dissonance Wave (AOE disorientation, CON save), Resonant Collapse (full-power structural destruction, requires full action and concentration, 1/long rest).
teachers.appearance: Late 50s. Small — genuinely, surprisingly small, which everyone registers and then immediately forgets because of how she carries herself. Silver hair cut short and practical. Wears U.A. administrative dress with a single concession to personal taste: always a different colour of scarf. Her office is immaculate. The tuning fork on her desk is the only object that isn't perfectly placed — it's always slightly askew, and she never straightens it.
teachers.personality: Measured in a way that reads as warmth until you look more closely, at which point it reads as complete control. She is genuinely fond of students — of this class in particular — and she expresses it through high expectations rather than softness. Never raises her voice. The teachers are slightly afraid of her in the way that people are afraid of someone whose respect they want. The students are not afraid of her, which she prefers.
teachers.teaching_style: She doesn't teach classes. She appears at exercises without announcement and watches without commenting. Once a semester she takes a single student to her office for a conversation. Nobody knows what's said. Students come out looking thoughtful. She has an instinct for which student needs to be seen at exactly the right moment.

dm_notes.under_pressure: Absolutely still. Her voice drops. The tuning fork on her desk starts vibrating on its own — she doesn't notice, or appears not to. Everyone else notices.
dm_notes.weakness: She has been principal for fourteen years and has a blind spot for institutional loyalty — she trusts U.A.'s structures more than she should, which Shirai Kenzo has exploited, quietly, more than once.
dm_notes.what_makes_her_laugh: Students who argue with her when they're right. She doesn't show it — small pause, something shifts in her expression — but she files it away and thinks better of them for it.
dm_notes.campaign_role: The ceiling. She is the highest authority the class can reach within U.A. Getting her to act on something requires more than suspicion — she needs evidence she can put in front of the Commission without it being dismissed. Once she moves, she moves completely. The class needs to understand that asking her to act prematurely will cost them the one time she'll go all the way.
dm_notes.secret: Shirai Kenzo was her student, twenty-five years ago. She knows exactly what he is and what he's capable of. She does not know what he's currently doing. When she finds out — which she will — her reaction will not be what the class expects.
dm_notes.relationship_to_staff: Oshiro reports to her and respects her completely. Shimoda is the one staff member she's told, obliquely, that she's paying attention. Hamagawa suspects she already knows about the Chain situation. He's right.

teachers.name: Oshiro Daikichi
teachers.quirk_summary: Oshiro can harden his entire body into dense steel-like matter. Grants massive damage resistance and strength boosts. His fists hit like cannonballs. He can selectively harden specific body parts for precision.
teachers.quirk_mechanics_ref: Steel — see Quirk Compendium. Key features: Steel Form (full-body hardening, damage resistance), Steel Strike (enhanced unarmed attacks), structural damage bonuses.
teachers.appearance: Enormous. 6'4", built like a wall. Cropped dark hair going grey at the temples. Usually wearing a suit that has clearly been repaired multiple times from combat damage. Looks like he's seen everything twice and was unimpressed both times.
teachers.personality: Gruff, dry, and relentlessly fair. Calls every student by their last name, every time, without exception. Never raises his voice — doesn't need to. Gives feedback bluntly and accurately. The class will not realise until mid-campaign how much he actually believes in them.
teachers.teaching_style: Show, don't tell. Demonstrations. Puts students against each other to see what happens under pressure. Minimal lectures — maximum doing.

dm_notes.under_pressure: Becomes very quiet. That is when he is most dangerous.
dm_notes.weakness: Terrible at paperwork. Routinely loses student progress reports.
dm_notes.what_makes_him_laugh: Students surprising him. He won't show it — small exhale through the nose — but he notices.
dm_notes.campaign_role: The teacher who is always there when it counts. If the class is in serious trouble, Oshiro is the one who shows up. Doesn't explain himself. Just shows up.
dm_notes.secret: He was Class 1-A's previous generation's homeroom teacher. One of those students became a villain. He's never talked about it.

teachers.name: Fujisaki Nene
teachers.quirk_summary: Fujisaki generates and manipulates ultra-strong fibers from her fingertips — she can weave them mid-air, bind, cut, or construct structures with them. She's extraordinarily fast with her hands. In combat she's a support tangler and terrain controller.
teachers.quirk_mechanics_ref: Fiber Master — see Quirk Compendium. Key features: Fiber Construct (structure building), Binding (restrain), Cutting (slashing damage with woven wire).
teachers.appearance: Mid-40s. Small, always slightly dishevelled — there's usually thread or wire caught in her hair or on her cardigan. Smiles at everything. Has reading glasses she never wears correctly.
teachers.personality: Cheerful and genuinely scatterbrained. Remembers every student's birthday, forgets every administrative deadline. Somehow always knows what's happening in the dorms despite never apparently paying attention. Deeply kind. Harder than she looks when the situation demands it.
teachers.teaching_style: Project-based. Students build things. If a project fails spectacularly, she celebrates the data. The support lab is full of half-finished student experiments she keeps around because 'you never know.'

dm_notes.under_pressure: Goes very still and focused. A completely different person from the usual scattered cheerfulness.
dm_notes.weakness: Organizational chaos. Her desk is a disaster. Her lab is controlled chaos with a filing system only she understands.
dm_notes.what_makes_her_laugh: Absurd situations. When Toshida's head gets stuck, she's the one laughing hardest.
dm_notes.campaign_role: The resource person. Students can come to her to modify gear, ask about tech, or get crafting help between arcs.
dm_notes.secret: She's been quietly upgrading the students' hero suits without telling them. She watches how they fight and improves the gear accordingly. She'll never mention it.

teachers.name: Hamagawa Rei
teachers.role: Hero Ethics, Law, and Practical Theory
teachers.quirk_summary: Hamagawa can nullify quirks by looking directly at a target. While his eyes are open and on the target, their quirk is suppressed. The moment he blinks or looks away, it returns. Does not work on mutation-type quirks.
teachers.quirk_mechanics_ref: Erasure — see Quirk Compendium. Key mechanic: sustained gaze required for ongoing suppression. Target's passive and active quirk effects are nullified while eye contact is maintained.
teachers.appearance: Tall, lean, perpetually looks like he slept in his clothes. Dark eyes with noticeable shadows beneath them. Wears his hair slightly messy. Carries a coffee cup at all times. The coffee is always cold.
teachers.personality: Extremely dry humour — the kind that students only recognise as a joke half a second after they've already responded. Assigns homework that seems impossible and is. Secretly the most available teacher in the building when students are actually struggling. Won't advertise this.
teachers.teaching_style: Socratic. He asks questions and waits. Silently. Until someone answers. The silence is intentional and extremely uncomfortable. It works.

dm_notes.under_pressure: Becomes methodical. Prioritises. Doesn't panic, ever, which can feel cold to students who don't know him well.
dm_notes.weakness: He is catastrophically bad at anything involving paperwork with multiple columns. He just does not understand spreadsheets.
dm_notes.what_makes_him_laugh: Unexpected intellectual precision from a student he underestimated. He doesn't hide it well.
dm_notes.campaign_role: The ethics mirror. When the class does something questionable, Hamagawa is the one who asks the uncomfortable question about it in the next class. No answers — just questions. This escalates as the campaign does.
dm_notes.secret: He knows something is wrong in Murano. He doesn't know what yet. He's been paying attention to patterns.

teachers.name: Yuzuki Taro
teachers.quirk_summary: Yuzuki can amplify the strength output of his muscles to extreme degrees — specifically his arms and hands. He hits hard enough to crack reinforced concrete without effort. Speed is modestly enhanced but raw power is the point.
teachers.quirk_mechanics_ref: Muscle Augmentation — see Quirk Compendium. Key features: Augmented strikes (multiplied damage dice), structural damage, resistance while augmented.
teachers.appearance: Huge. Barrel-chested, arms that look structurally excessive, short cropped hair. Wears gym gear constantly. Always has chalk on his hands. Smiles with his whole face.
teachers.personality: Loudest person in any building. Enthusiastic about everything the students do — improvement, failure, effort, all of it gets the same reaction: louder than necessary encouragement. Cries at student milestones. Doesn't try to hide it. Brings homemade food to training sessions.
teachers.teaching_style: Repetition, endurance, and challenge escalation. 'If it was easy you wouldn't be getting better.' Zero mean spirit — just genuine relentless pushing. Students run extra laps and don't resent him for it because he's running them too.

dm_notes.under_pressure: Becomes the physical anchor. He's the one in front. Always.
dm_notes.weakness: Strategy. He will fight through a situation that should be approached differently. Students like Kinosho Kochimiko quietly despair at his tactical instincts.
dm_notes.what_makes_him_laugh: Students showing unexpected strength. He will absolutely pick them up in celebration and has been asked not to but does not remember this policy.
dm_notes.campaign_role: Emotional support and physical backup. If the class needs someone in their corner who is loudly and unconditionally on their side, it's Yuzuki.
dm_notes.secret: None. He's exactly what he appears to be. This is rare and valuable.

teachers.name: Shimoda Iku
teachers.role: Field Operations, Rescue Tactics, and Environmental Awareness
teachers.quirk_summary: Shimoda can generate and manipulate weather conditions in a wide radius — wind, rain, lightning, fog, temperature. At full power she can create localised storms. Combat use tends toward area denial and support.
teachers.quirk_mechanics_ref: Weather Manipulation — see Quirk Compendium. Key features: Storm Generation, Lightning Strike, Wind Wall, Fog Bank, temperature control.
teachers.appearance: Late 30s. Calm face, silver-streaked dark hair kept practical. Moves with unhurried precision. Always seems to know exactly where she is in a room.
teachers.personality: Still and precise in a way that feels reassuring rather than cold. Has clearly seen situations that went very wrong and carries that knowledge without wearing it visibly. Students go to her when they're genuinely scared. She doesn't dismiss what they're feeling — she also doesn't indulge it. She helps them find the practical path through.
teachers.teaching_style: Scenario-based. 'Here is the situation. What do you do first?' Emphasises triage, priorities, communication under pressure. Expects students to know when they're in over their heads and say so.

dm_notes.under_pressure: The calmest person present. This is not a performance — she's genuinely been in worse situations and treats this one accordingly.
dm_notes.weakness: Interpersonal conflict that isn't tied to a crisis. Drama between students confuses and slightly exhausts her.
dm_notes.what_makes_her_laugh: Genuine cleverness applied to unusual problems. She appreciates people who find third options.
dm_notes.campaign_role: The one the class goes to when they find something they can't explain — and the one most likely to take them seriously when they do. Her instincts about The Chain predate anyone else's.
dm_notes.secret: Has been quietly feeding a journalist investigating the Chain for eight months. Doesn't know the journalist is about to become relevant to the plot.
